task_completion.description: Navigate to the JFrog Artifactory login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the JFrog Artifactory login screen, typically at http://localhost:8082.

task_completion.description: Log in using the admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory dashboard or welcome screen is visible, and the user profile indicates the 'admin' user is logged in.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the User Management or Identity and Access section in the Administration module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration module is open, showing the 'Users' or 'Groups' list under Identity and Access / User Management.

task_completion.description: Open the settings for either the user 'dev-maria' or the group 'release-engineers'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit screen or details panel for the user 'dev-maria' or the group 'release-engineers' is actively displayed.

task_completion.description: Assign the user 'dev-maria' to the 'release-engineers' group and save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'release-engineers' group is shown in the assigned/included groups list for 'dev-maria', OR 'dev-maria' is shown in the members list for 'release-engineers'. A success toast notification or the updated list view confirming the saved assignment should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser UI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JFrog Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or JFrog CLI) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JFrog Artifactory application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8082 and the interface matches JFrog Artifactory, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or API calls to complete the assignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing REST API calls or scripts to modify user/group assignments.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user: 'dev-maria'. Target group: 'release-engineers'. Admin credentials: 'admin' / 'password'. Artifactory URL: http://localhost:8082.
